name: KDDI Cloud Platform
description: KDDIs carrier-grade Japanese cloud — VM, private connect and SD-WAN integration for enterprise migrations.

seo.title: KDDI Cloud Platform — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: KDDI Cloud Platform: KDDIs carrier-grade Japanese cloud — VM, private connect and SD-WAN integration for enterprise migrations.

when_to_use: Carrier-grade Japanese cloud with VM and private connectivity
Enterprise cloud migration to KDDI's Japan-native infrastructure
SD-WAN and cloud networking integration for Japanese firms
Compliant cloud hosting with KDDI's telecom-grade SLAs
Private cloud and dedicated hardware for Japanese enterprises

review.verdict: Solid carrier cloud for Japanese enterprises needing telco-grade networking, not for greenfield cloud-native.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises migrating legacy workloads with private network requirements
review.not_for: Cloud-native startups, global products, or developers wanting modern PaaS
